message:
refactor(robot): extract GetRoute for CLI/REST parity

Refactor PrintRoute to extract GetRoute that returns data struct directly:
- GetRoute returns (*RouteOutput, exitCode) for direct use by REST API
- PrintRoute wraps GetRoute and handles JSON output

This follows the same pattern as GetContext, GetSnapshotDelta, GetTriage
to enable consistent REST API implementation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
